headerDisplay: Homebridge Plugin for Philips Air Purifiers / Humidifiers.

aioairctrlPath.title: aioairctrl Path
aioairctrlPath.description: Full path to the aioairctrl executable, e.g. /home/pi/.local/bin/aioairctrl. Leave empty if it is on the PATH of the user running Homebridge.

debug.title: Debug Log
debug.description: Enables additional output (debug) in the log.

warn.title: Warn Log
warn.description: Enables additional output (warn) in the log.

error.title: Error Log
error.description: Enables additional output (error) in the log.

extendedError.title: Extended Error Log
extendedError.description: Enables additional output (detailed error) in the log.

condition.functionBody: try { return model.error } catch(e){ return false }

active.title: Active
active.description: If enabled, the device will be exposed to HomeKit.

name.title: Name
name.description: Set the device name for display in the Home app.

manufacturer.title: Manufacturer
manufacturer.description: Set the manufacturer name for display in the Home app.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model for display in the Home app. For tested devices, pick the exact ID from the suggestions — some models need it for the correct speed/key mappings (see the tested devices list in the README). Any other value works with default settings.

serialNumber.title: Serial Number
serialNumber.description: Set the serial number for display in the Home app.

host.title: Host Address
host.description: IP address or hostname of your device, e.g. 10.0.1.16 or purifier.local.

condition.functionBody: try { return model.devices[arrayIndices[0]].active } catch(e){ return false }
try { return model.devices[arrayIndices[0]].active } catch(e){ return false }

humidifier.title: Humidifier
humidifier.description: Expose a separate humidifier accessory to HomeKit.

light.title: Light
light.description: Expose device lights as lightbulbs to HomeKit.

temperature.title: Temperature sensor
temperature.description: Expose device temperature as temperature sensor to HomeKit.

humidity.title: Humidity sensor
humidity.description: Expose device humidity as humidity sensor to HomeKit.

carbonFilter.title: Active Carbon Filter
carbonFilter.description: Expose active carbon filter status to HomeKit.

hepaFilter.title: HEPA Filter
hepaFilter.description: Expose HEPA/NanoProtect filter status to HomeKit.

condition.functionBody: try { return model.devices[arrayIndices[0]].active } catch(e){ return false }
try { return model.devices[arrayIndices[0]].active } catch(e){ return false }
try { return model.devices[arrayIndices[0]].active } catch(e){ return false }
